ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "source_property" TEXT /* Name of the COBOL data processing property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "values" TEXT /* Possible values for the property */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the property (e.g., default value, required) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source level where the property is defined */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity level where the property is defined */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field level where the property is defined */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property is mandatory */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property can be inherited from a higher level */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the property value */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Custom error message if the validation rule fails */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the property is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the entity is used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the entity */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the entity was checked for consistency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the source is used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the source was checked for consistency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity where the value is set */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the value is set */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value set for the property */,
  "set_by" TEXT /* User who set the value */,
  "set_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was set */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the value is set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the value */,
  "validation_result" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the value passed the validation rule */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message if the validation failed */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the value is the default value for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, data engineer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that was changed */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity where the value was changed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the value was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the property */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the property */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the change was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change */,
  "validation_result" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change passed the validation rule */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message if the change failed validation */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the field is mandatory */,
  "is_unique" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the field must be unique */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the field */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Custom error message if the validation rule fails */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the field is used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the field */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the field was checked for consistency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)
